attributes.action: Make school rules apply the same way to all students and do not be subjective
attributes.additional_details: I want this to change so students are not feeling subjective to consequences compared to other students because they were not seen or are harder to deal with. Do not allow rules to be set and then only apply to certain people. The Government makes rules, our schools make rules. I want the Government or Parliament to take action to show that we are of equality and we are being treated the same no matter if we are students who misbehave or if we are students who always try and do what is right.
attributes.background: We need to have schools become fair with the way they deal with students following the school rules. Some students get away with not following these policies because they are ‘harder to deal with’ or ‘they do not listen’. We need equality and action. We need you to reiterate this to schools.
